untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental earnings data (EPS, YoY growth, earnings surprises) which are not available in the allowed technical indicators list. The allowed indicators are limited to price action, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume ratios, and bar properties. Earnings-based signals require access to earnings databases or fundamental data feeds not present in this technical-only indicator set.
translation_notes: SCHWAGER_DRY_0_0 is based on the CANSLIM methodology which emphasizes fundamental earnings momentum. While the signal references earnings acceleration and YoY growth rates as core entry/exit criteria, these require quarterly EPS data and fundamental analysis. The rule cannot be translated to technical indicators alone. To implement this signal, a separate fundamental data layer would be required with indicators such as: current_quarter_eps_yoy_growth, prior_quarter_eps_yoy_growth, earnings_surprise_pct, and earnings_acceleration_rate.
